title: Knowledge notes
description: A durable, cited note the records/librarian and clinic/researcher write so the app gets smarter over time — the interpreter and analyst read these on future analyses. This is the db-backed knowledge store (distinct from the space `knowledge/` authoring files, which stay a build-time concern).

topic.description: the subject of the note, e.g. 'elevated LDL cholesterol'

body.description: the note in markdown, with citations

documentId.description: the source document this note derived from (null if not document-driven)

analyte.description: the lab analyte this note is about, if any (used to surface it on the matching lab)

tag.description: an optional free tag for grouping notes
